meta_description: At Junying, we offer quick-turn custom metal CNC machining services and machined metal parts made of various materials for your specific applications across a wide variety of industries.

sections.heading: JunYing’s Capacity of CNC Metal Machining Services
sections.text: JunYing’s Capacity of CNC Metal Machining Services With many years of rich experience and advanced automated processing lines, JUNYING is able to provide a full range of advanced metal CNC processing methods, allowing global customers to easily obtain metal parts or products with the required geometry, size, performance or surface quality. Our services mainly include CNC milling, CNC turning, CNC Electrical Discharge Machining (EDM), etc. ‌ CNC Metal Milling Drawing on years of providing metal machining services for tens of thousands of clients in China and worldwide, JUNYING offers high-precision, customized metal CNC milling services. We support 3-axis, 4-axis, 5-axis, and even more advan...

sections.heading: CNC Metal Milling
sections.text: CNC Metal Milling Drawing on years of providing metal machining services for tens of thousands of clients in China and worldwide, JUNYING offers high-precision, customized metal CNC milling services. We support 3-axis, 4-axis, 5-axis, and even more advanced CNC milling processes to meet customers’ diverse needs for complex structures and high-precision metal components, delivering efficiently whether for single prototypes or batch production. Multi-axis Machining Capability: Supporting 3-axis, 4-axis, 5-axis, 6-axis, and even 7-axis CNC milling, we can process complex curved surfaces and multi-angle structures, meeting the manufacturing demands for high-difficulty metal parts. Diverse Metal...

sections.heading: CNC Metal Turning
sections.text: CNC Metal Turning JUNYING, through advanced CNC turning centers, provides customers with high-quality, customized metal turning component production services. We can quickly respond to on-demand manufacturing needs for various metal parts, efficiently delivering from single prototypes to large batch production, covering a range of metal materials and precision complex structures. Ultra-high Precision and Multiple Tolerance Options: Supporting ISO 2768, ISO 286, and other tolerances to meet the needs of precision parts. Wide Range of Metal Materials: Covering more than 30 types of metals, including aluminum, steel, stainless steel, copper, brass, titanium, balancing strength, corrosion resis...

sections.heading: CNC Metal Drilling
sections.text: CNC Metal Drilling JUNYING also offers customers high-precision, flexible batch metal CNC drilling services. With various types of CNC drilling machines and extensive process experience, we can complete precision drilling on various metal materials, meeting different design and industrial application needs for both simple through holes and complex patterns. Strong Large Diameter Drilling Capability: Supporting drilling diameters up to 7 cm, suitable for oversized or specially structured metal workpieces. Diverse Drilling Forms: Capable of straight holes, deep holes, blind holes, compound patterns, and more, meeting complex structural requirements. High-precision Drilling: Tolerances up to ±...

sections.heading: Metal EDM Maching
sections.text: Metal EDM Maching JUNYING offers high-precision metal EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining) services, efficiently completing complex profiles, ultra-fine structures, and high-hardness metal precision machining. Equipped with advanced EDM machines and an experienced engineering team, we serve a wide range of industrial applications such as molds and precision parts, helping customers achieve structural designs and functional requirements that traditional cutting processes cannot fulfill. Processing of Complex Inner Profiles and Sharp Angles: EDM easily achieves deep grooves, sharp angles, blind holes, and irregular cavities that traditional tools cannot process. Stress-free Processing of High...

sections.heading: CNC Metal Cutting
sections.text: CNC Metal Cutting JUNYING provides efficient and precise CNC metal cutting services, including laser cutting, plasma cutting, waterjet cutting, and other advanced techniques. We can flexibly select the optimal cutting solution according to different materials and part structures, enabling efficient and consistent component production, widely applied in machinery manufacturing, automotive, aerospace, and many other fields. Diverse Cutting Process Options: Depending on material thickness, structural complexity, and precision requirements, choosing among laser, plasma, or waterjet cutting for efficient processing from thin to thick plates. High Cutting Precision and Edge Quality: Clean, precis...

sections.heading: Other Metal Machining Services
sections.text: Other Metal Machining Services Other auxiliary metal processing processes include CNC forging, CNC casting, and metal forming processing. These processes can be flexibly selected according to part structure, performance requirements and material properties, and are important supplementary means for batch manufacturing, complex structures or high-strength metal parts. Different processes have their own advantages. It is necessary to combine specific equipment configuration and material properties to reasonably select the most suitable metal processing method to achieve the best structural performance and production efficiency.

sections.heading: Surface Treatment For CNC Machined Metal Parts
sections.text: Surface Treatment For CNC Machined Metal Parts JUNYING not only provides customers with high-precision, high-efficiency CNC metal machining services, but also supports a variety of metal surface treatments. Based on the performance and appearance requirements of different parts, we recommend and implement professional surface treatment solutions to enhance corrosion resistance, mechanical properties, and aesthetics, helping customers obtain high-quality custom parts.
